narrative.description: PUBG drops 100 players onto an island to scavenge weapons and gear while a shrinking safe zone forces escalating firefights until one squad or player remains.
narrative.core_loop: Parachute onto the map, loot buildings for weapons and armor, reposition inside the shrinking circle, and eliminate opponents in last-player-standing matches.

mechanics.map_notes: In Playerunknown’s Battlegrounds, minimal UI encourages discovery of landmarks and secrets across vast terrain.
mechanics.expression: In Playerunknown’s Battlegrounds, minimal UI encourages discovery of landmarks and secrets across vast terrain.

mechanics.map_notes: In Playerunknown’s Battlegrounds, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.
mechanics.expression: In Playerunknown’s Battlegrounds, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.

mechanics.map_notes: In Playerunknown’s Battlegrounds, weapons, armor, and accessories occupy distinct equipment slots and modify combat stats and abilities.
mechanics.expression: In Playerunknown’s Battlegrounds, weapons, armor, and accessories occupy distinct equipment slots and modify combat stats and abilities.

mechanics.map_notes: In Playerunknown’s Battlegrounds, a survival mechanic where the player character possesses a finite quantity of health points that decrease when taking damage, with depletion resulting in failure.
mechanics.expression: In Playerunknown’s Battlegrounds, a survival mechanic where the player character possesses a finite quantity of health points that decrease when taking damage, with depletion resulting in failure.

mechanics.map_notes: In Playerunknown’s Battlegrounds, matches are divided into rounds with separate health pools; winning a set number of rounds wins the match.
mechanics.expression: In Playerunknown’s Battlegrounds, matches are divided into rounds with separate health pools; winning a set number of rounds wins the match.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Playerunknown’s Battlegrounds through its core battle royale loop.
